scripts.ginstall: cd LyraBackend && npm install && cd ../LyraFront && npm install && cd ../LyraAI && docker compose build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,ai,frontend -c cyan,magenta,green -k "npm run backend" "npm run ai" "npm run frontend"
scripts.services: concurrently -n backend,ai -c cyan,magenta -k "npm run backend" "npm run ai"
